tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-icmp-from-attacker"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "attacker-host"
set dstaddr "icmp-target"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
next
end"}

tool_calls.content:
